# E106 E101 Subject-Prior Gate

## Question

E105 says E101 is global-prior adverse but closer to live under subject priors.
This audit asks whether subject-prior support can select a smaller E101-style
rollback that is healthier than full E101 before public feedback.

## Result

- variant rows: `268`
- E101-pass variants: `12`
- prior-healthier variants: `56`
- interesting non-replacements: `6`
- replacement rows: `0`
- materialized submission: `none`

## Interpretation

No subject-prior-gated rollback replaces E101. Subject prior improves label-world interpretation, but it should not be used as a pre-feedback candidate generator.
